family_title: canonical session / continuation access and recent-project runtime-hints continuity

mutations: replace the Session Continuity block in STATE.md with stale host/platform/resume metadata
create a partial current workspace that only has GPD/state.json, GPD/STATE.md, and GPD/ROADMAP.md
pair that workspace with a stronger recent-project candidate from resume-recent-noise
assertions: state_get(session|continuation|handoff) returns canonical payloads from state.json
stale Session Continuity prose does not override canonical continuity fields
recent-project selection prefers the stronger recent project over the partial current workspace
runtime-hints hydration preserves recent-project provenance and missing-handoff fields

exact_fix.fix_summary: Encode the Phase 15 contract for canonical continuity access, recent-project selection, and runtime-hints provenance without changing production behavior in this lane.
exact_fix.expected_after_fix: The contract test passes and confirms the existing fix is still closed under stale markdown, partial-current-workspace, and missing-handoff conditions.

adjacent_checks.why_it_matters: Confirms the canonical state accessor stays aligned with the snapshot and markdown renderer.
Ensures the partial current workspace does not outrank a stronger recent project.
Ensures hydration preserves session provenance and missing-handoff data in runtime hints.

notes: This lane intentionally stays test-and-artifact only.
The contract covers both canonical continuity access and the recent-project/runtime-hints continuity edge.
